name: WannaCry Global Ransomware Campaign

victim.description: 200,000+ victims in 150 countries; NHS UK hospitals most impacted; FedEx, Telefónica, Deutsche Bahn, and others

infrastructure.description: EternalBlue SMB exploit for propagation; DOUBLEPULSAR backdoor; hardcoded kill-switch domain (sinkholed by researcher)

description: Lazarus Group deployed WannaCry worm-ransomware using stolen NSA EternalBlue exploit. Spread autonomously across unpatched Windows systems. Caused $4–8B in damages globally; UK NHS cancelled ~19,000 appointments.
